query: SELECT u.id, u.name, COUNT(cm.id) as message_count, MAX(cm.created_at) as latest_message, MIN(cm.created_at) as oldest_message FROM users u LEFT JOIN chat_messages cm ON cm.user_id = u.id GROUP BY u.id, u.name ORDER BY u.id;
